ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., IND for individual vehicle data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., intersection, road segment) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, arterial, collector) */,
  "speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit at the location in km/h */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route (e.g., Route 101) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., highway, arterial, collector) */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Average traffic volume on the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., CYCLE, CAR, TRUCK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "length" REAL /* Average length of the vehicle type in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Average width of the vehicle type in meters */,
  "height" REAL /* Average height of the vehicle type in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direction */,
  "direction_code" TEXT /* Code for the direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "axle_configurations" (
  "axle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each axle configuration */,
  "axle_grouping" TEXT /* Axle grouping configuration (e.g., 1, 2+2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the axle grouping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("axle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., traffic management, planning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregated_data" (
  "aggregated_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the aggregation */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the aggregation */,
  "total_vehicles" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles */,
  "average_wheelbase" REAL /* Average wheelbase of vehicles */,
  "average_headway" REAL /* Average headway between vehicles */,
  "average_gap" REAL /* Average gap between vehicles */,
  "average_axle" INTEGER /* Average number of axles per vehicle */,
  "average_rho" INTEGER /* Average RHO value */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume on the route during the aggregation period */,
  "traffic_density" REAL /* Traffic density on the route during the aggregation period (vehicles per kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregated_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_data_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the signal is installed */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., fixed-time, actuated) */,
  "cycle_length" INTEGER /* Length of the signal cycle in seconds */,
  "green_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the green phase in seconds */,
  "red_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the red phase in seconds */,
  "yellow_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the yellow phase in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, roadwork, weather) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incident */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of collection in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of collection as a percentage */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of collection (e.g., clear, rain, fog) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
